compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Epic AC10 explicitly requires the new authorship verdict `key_not_valid_at_era` to be
added to the canonical `src/rebar/schemas/verify_signature_result.schema.json` verdict
enum (the shared verify-result verdict vocabulary), alongside the display grouping. TS3
(117b) added `key_not_valid_at_era` as a verify-authorship constant but deliberately left
that schema untouched (judged a separate command). The epic AC is the contract, so this
story reconciles by extending the shared schema enum. (Remediation of epic gnu-whale-ichor;
see session_log fanatical-gentling-bushbaby.)

## What
- Add `"key_not_valid_at_era"` to the `verdict` enum in
  `src/rebar/schemas/verify_signature_result.schema.json` (making the enum
  `["unsigned", "foreign_key", "certified", "mismatch", "key_not_valid_at_era"]`), and note
  in the schema `description` the `verified / unverified (bad-signature |
  key_not_valid_at_era | unknown-author) / unsigned` display grouping.
- Update the TS3 held-out test `test_verify_signature_schema_unchanged` (in
  `tests/unit/test_identity_ts3_117b_heldout.py`) — which currently asserts the enum is
  the original 4 values — to assert the enum now INCLUDES `key_not_valid_at_era`. (This is
  a deliberate correction of that test to the epic-AC contract, not a weakening.)
- Regenerate/keep green any schema-derived drift gates (public-types / output-schema).

## Scope
In: the schema enum value + the test update + any derived drift-gate refresh. Out: the
verify-authorship classification logic itself (TS3, done — it already emits the verdict).
Folds into the 3183 commit (change 580).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `verify_signature_result.schema.json`'s `verdict` enum contains
  `key_not_valid_at_era` (plus the original four); a test asserts the full enum set.
- [ ] The schema `description` documents the verified/unverified/unsigned display grouping.
- [ ] All schema-derived drift gates (public-types, output-schema coverage) pass.

## file_impact
- `src/rebar/schemas/verify_signature_result.schema.json` (add key_not_valid_at_era to verdict enum + grouping note)
- `tests/unit/test_identity_ts3_117b_heldout.py` (assert enum now includes the new verdict)
compiled_state.title: identity: add key_not_valid_at_era to verify_signature_result schema (epic AC10)
